home.marqueeText: Emotional Storytelling AI Cinematic Production Creative Agency Neural Architectures

timeline.title: Our Story
timeline.subtitle: The Origins
timeline.text: Between late-night brainstorming and global campaign deep-dives, we cracked the formula: Emotion + Storytelling + Social Media. We built Gaa-tha to turn brand moments into movements—mixing taste, rigor, and speed.

timeline.title: Abhishek Khuthiya
timeline.subtitle: The Strategist
timeline.text: A business analyst turned brand storyteller, Abhishek drives Gaa-tha’s marketing magic. With a background in international business and an obsession with brand psychology, he ensures every campaign is built on insight and impact.

timeline.title: Getansh Savla
timeline.subtitle: The Creative Mind
timeline.text: A finance expert who traded spreadsheets for storytelling, Getansh crafts Gaa-tha’s most memorable campaigns.

timeline.title: The Problem
timeline.subtitle: Why We Exist
timeline.text: Brands craved engagement and loyalty but were lost in the digital noise. Algorithms favored quantity over quality; audiences scrolled past forgettable creative.

timeline.title: Our Solution
timeline.subtitle: Emotional Storytelling
timeline.text: Emotional storytelling powered by social—impactful, efficient, and truly connective. We blend performance data with creative taste to ship content people actually care about.

timeline.title: Our Mission
timeline.subtitle: The Goal
timeline.text: Create content that makes people feel, engage, and stay loyal—because people don’t just buy products; they buy stories. Every deliverable carries a clear outcome: awareness, engagement, or revenue.
